title: Stage 11 – Vendor Rating Summary Backend Query (AR-3)

requirements.text: Add a dedicated backend query function `getVendorRatingSummary(vendorId: Principal)` that returns a structured rating summary for a given vendor, including average star rating (Float), total review count (Nat), and a breakdown of counts per star level (1–5). This should replace or complement the current approach where rating data is aggregated on the frontend from raw reviews.

quotes: AR-3: add a dedicated vendor rating summary query

acceptanceCriteria: A public query `getVendorRatingSummary` exists in `backend/main.mo` accepting a vendor Principal and returning a record with averageRating (Float), totalReviews (Nat), and a per-star breakdown (array or record of Nat counts for stars 1–5).
The function returns a correct average based on all stored reviews for the vendor.
The per-star breakdown counts sum to totalReviews.
The function returns a zeroed/empty summary (not a trap or error) when no reviews exist for the given vendor.

requirements.text: Add a `useGetVendorRatingSummary(vendorId)` React Query hook in `frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts` that calls the new `getVendorRatingSummary` backend query, replacing any frontend-side aggregation of raw review data for rating summaries. Update `VendorCard.tsx`, `VendorStorePage.tsx`, and `VendorReviewsSection.tsx` to use this hook.

quotes: AR-3: add a dedicated vendor rating summary query

acceptanceCriteria: A `useGetVendorRatingSummary(vendorId)` hook is exported from `useQueries.ts` and calls the backend `getVendorRatingSummary` function.
`VendorCard.tsx` uses the new hook instead of computing the rating summary from raw reviews.
`VendorStorePage.tsx` and `VendorReviewsSection.tsx` use the new hook for displaying rating summaries where applicable.
The hook handles loading and error states gracefully, showing a loading indicator or fallback UI while fetching.

constraints: Do not modify any files listed under frontend.immutablePaths.
All backend logic must remain in the single `backend/main.mo` actor.
Only generate `backend/migration.mo` if the stable state shape changes and migration is required.
nonGoals: No new UI pages or layout changes beyond consuming the new rating summary hook.
No changes to the review submission flow.
No changes to how reviews are stored in the backend.
